benefic. The full Moon, the Moon on the tenth day of the
bright half and on the fifth day of the other half, and the half
Moon are benefics respectively as full, three-quarters, and
half. Saturn, Rahu and the waning Moon are malefics. The
Sun is a half malefic, but when Mercury and Venus are with
the waning Moon, they are full benefics like Jupiter. The

92 Rectification of Birth Time
Moon in debilitation or in conjunction with the Sun is similar
to Saturn. So too is the Moon aspected by Saturn. But the
Moon may be a waning one, and he may be aspected by
Saturn; but if such a Moon is aspected by Jupiter, he is a full
benefic. So is the Moon in Sagittarius and Pisces. The Moon
and Mercury become malefics, when they are with malefics,
even if they occupy their owu signs.
Now we proceed to consider the planets that become male
fics or benefics because of certain factors. Even a natural
benefic does become a malefic by owning a Kendra, or by being
